meaning: v.投(资),购买(有用之物)～,授予,投资
examples: It would be hazardous to invest so much.
Many people don't like to invest in stocks.
They had the foresight to invest in new technology.
This year's show had plenty of examples of how schools might invest their ICT money.
We can also give you some perspective that will help you invest for the long term.
